name: Global Indemnity Group, LLC
business: Global Indemnity is a publicly traded holding company that operates in the Excess and Surplus Lines Marketplace, deriving revenues primarily from premiums on insurance policies and investment income. It has three reportable segments: Agency and Insurance Services, Belmont Core (ongoing direct insurance and assumed reinsurance), and Belmont Non-Core (run-off business).

exposures.sentence: The Company operates in the Excess and Surplus Lines Marketplace ("E&S Marketplace") and derives its revenues primarily from premiums paid on insurance policies that it writes and from income generated by its investment portfolio, net of fees paid for investment management services.

catalysts.event: Transfer of class A common shares listing from NYSE to Nasdaq Global Select Market
catalysts.sentence: Effective after close of trading on November 3, 2025, the Company transferred the listing of its class A common shares (excluding class A common shares designated as class A-2 common shares) from the New York Stock Exchange to the Nasdaq Global Select Market where the shares continue to trade under the existing ticker symbol 'GBLI'.

catalysts.event: AM Best affirmed Financial Strength Rating of A (Excellent) for U.S. operating subsidiaries
catalysts.sentence: On August 8, 2025, AM Best affirmed the Financial Strength Rating of A (Excellent) for the U.S. operating subsidiaries of Global Indemnity Group, LLC.

catalysts.event: Share repurchase program authorized up to $135 million expires
catalysts.sentence: Global Indemnity Group, LLC's Board of Directors has authorized share repurchases of up to $135 million in aggregate under this program that expires on December 31, 2027.
